tasks.label: Build (F7)
tasks.command: cmd /c ""C:\Users\i4studio\esp\v5.4.1\esp-idf\export.bat" && idf.py build && cmake --build build --target host_coverage" && Write-Host '' && Write-Host '========== COVERAGE OUTPUT ==========' -ForegroundColor Cyan && if (Test-Path 'tests/build/coverage_html/index.html') { Write-Host 'HTML report: tests/build/coverage_html/index.html' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host 'HTML report not found at tests/build/coverage_html/index.html' -ForegroundColor Yellow } ; if (Test-Path 'tests/build/coverage.xml') { Write-Host 'Cobertura XML: tests/build/coverage.xml' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host 'Cobertura XML not found at tests/build/coverage.xml' -ForegroundColor Yellow }
